message:
readme: hero screenshot + live-demo CTA at the top

Captures the deployed Console at https://ruvnet.github.io/RuLake/
showing the Stats route with '● LIVE · rulake-mcp.ruv.io' pill in
the top-right (the auto-probe worked at the moment of capture).
Linked to the live demo so the screenshot doubles as a click target.

Plus a one-line CTA below the image: 'Try the live Console → boots
in DEMO, auto-probes the hosted MCP at rulake-mcp.ruv.io, and flips
the top-right pill to ● LIVE when the wire's up. Eight tools served,
zero install.'

Image is 131 KB PNG, 1280×605 (browser viewport). Reading order on
the README is now hero → CTA → existing badge row.

files.patch: @@ -1,5 +1,9 @@ # ruLake — A Memory Lake for Agentic AI + + +> **[Try the live Console →](https://ruvnet.github.io/RuLake/)** — boots in DEMO, auto-probes the hosted MCP at [`rulake-mcp.ruv.io`](https://rulake-mcp.ruv.io/), and flips the top-right pill to `● LIVE` when the wire's up. Eight tools served, zero install. + [![Crates.io](https://img.shields.io/crates/v/rulake.svg)](https://crates.io/crates/rulake) [![Rust 1.89+](https://img.shields.io/badge/rust-1.89%2B-orange.svg)](https://www.rust-lang.org) [![RuVector](https://img.shields.io/badge/part_of-ruvector-purple.svg)](https://github.com/ruvnet/ruvector)
